text: If you ever book a flight it’s probably via a Conmon Lisp program that Google acquired for $750M. Lisp also runs on off-world vehicles, is the implementation language for the largest online bank in South America, was used to model the face of Gollum in the LoTR movies, &c, Weird to see such confidently stated ignorance on this forum…
